name: pi-learnings
description: Approval-gated learning capture for Pi: turn concrete mistakes into durable agent rules.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --allowImportingTsExtensions --skipLibCheck index.ts test/smoke.ts test/interactive.ts test/config.ts test/model-classify.ts test/model-draft.ts test/review-picker.ts test/safety.ts test/ux-polish.ts test/learn-main-menu.ts test/global-target.ts test/picker-label-unique.ts test/picker-quality.ts test/picker-specific-tool.ts test/picker-semantic-match.ts test/subagent-picker.ts test/subagent-transcript-picker.ts test/multi-pick.ts test/duplicate-update.ts
scripts.test: tsx test/smoke.ts && tsx test/interactive.ts && tsx test/config.ts && tsx test/model-classify.ts && tsx test/model-draft.ts && tsx test/review-picker.ts && tsx test/safety.ts && tsx test/ux-polish.ts && tsx test/learn-main-menu.ts && tsx test/global-target.ts && tsx test/picker-label-unique.ts && tsx test/picker-quality.ts && tsx test/picker-specific-tool.ts && tsx test/picker-semantic-match.ts && tsx test/subagent-picker.ts && tsx test/subagent-transcript-picker.ts && tsx test/multi-pick.ts && tsx test/duplicate-update.ts
scripts.test:ci: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm test && npm pack --dry-run && git diff --check
